scripts.gen:api: npm --prefix server run tsoa && yarn --cwd client gen:types
scripts.ensure:deps: ([ -x client/node_modules/.bin/vite ] || yarn --cwd client install) && ([ -d server/node_modules ] || npm --prefix server install)
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n client,server -c blue,green "yarn --cwd client dev" "(npm run gen:api && npm --prefix server run dev) || true"
